text: I feel a sense of anticipation amid the clean geometry and glass of the hallway. Moving into the R&D space, I am greeted by bursts of color, layered text, and multimedia displays. The environment excites my curiosity, asking me to consider the intersection of innovation and human experience. The text about uncertainty and possibility resonates with me; I sense a quiet optimism here, and I am moved to reflect on the unknowns that inspire creation and thought.
